reasoning: XLK +0.93%, XLF +0.52%, XLE +0.59% — all major sectors aligned upward with strong risk-on participation. VIX falling -19.95% reinforces bullish breadth. However, all three sectors are outperforming SPY (+0.39%), indicating narrow tech-led leadership rather than broad-based buying. Market is risk-on but concentrated in growth/tech. Premarket gap +17.34 on strong ribbon (BULL, 724¢ spread) supports continuation, but watch for profit-taking reversal if tech pauses.
key_observations: XLK: +0.93% — tech leading the charge, 54bps ahead of SPY
XLF: +0.52% — financials positive, supporting broad upside (but modest gain)
XLE: +0.59% — energy also up, confirms risk-on rotation (not defensive)
SPY lag: All three sectors outperforming SPY suggests concentration risk — tech is doing heavy lifting while broader market lags
